context: Tests Metrics graph URL construction including namespace slash encoding and ISO timestamp colon encoding.

checklist.name: Namespace slash encoded as *2f
checklist.description: AWS/Lambda namespace has the slash encoded as *2f (producing AWS*2fLambda)

checklist.name: ISO timestamp colons encoded as *3a
checklist.description: Colons in start/end ISO timestamps are encoded as *3a

checklist.name: Stat set to Maximum
checklist.description: stat parameter is set to Maximum

checklist.name: Namespace metric dimension value all present
checklist.description: URL contains AWS*2fLambda, Duration, FunctionName, and checkout-service-prod in the metrics tuple

checklist.name: Region correct in both subdomain and query param
checklist.description: us-east-1 appears in both the URL subdomain and region= query parameter

checklist.name: Structural characters unencoded
checklist.description: Tilde ~ parentheses ( ) and single quote ' are left literal as structural CloudWatch URL characters
